title: json-sort-server settings
description: Configuration for the json-sort-server LSP, passed via initializationOptions.

scopes.description: Toggle sort scopes. Each scope accepts `true` (enabled, uses global actions), `false` (disabled), or an actions object for per-scope overrides.

scopeConfig.description: `true` to enable (inherits global actions), `false` to disable, or an actions object for per-scope overrides.

actionSettings.description: Toggle individual sort strategies. All default to `true`.

randomize.description: Shuffle entries into a random order.

by_value.description: Sort by the stringified JSON value.

by_key_length.description: Sort by the string length of the key name.

by_value_length.description: Sort by the length/size of the value.

by_value_type.description: Group entries by JSON value type (bool, null, number, string, array, object).

sort_list_items.description: Sort the elements of JSON arrays.

sort_all.description: Sort both object properties and array elements.
